## GoalOS PR safety checklist

- [ ] This PR contains no personal data, customer data, confidential data, credentials, private keys, secrets, regulated data, or trade secrets.
- [ ] This PR does not broaden permissions, add tracking, add analytics, connect wallets, call external APIs, or authorize production actions unless explicitly reviewed.
- [ ] This PR preserves the claim boundary: no achieved AGI/ASI/SOTA, no legal/financial/investment/security advice, no production authorization.
- [ ] Any Evidence Docket content is public-safe and contains no private intelligence or sensitive data.
- [ ] I have rights to submit all content in this PR.
